roleTitle: Senior software engineer, Machine Learning Engineer.
summary: Award-winning AI surveillance platform delivering real-time CCTV analytics and threat detection for counter-terrorism operations in airports and law enforcement environments. Left due to being bought out by an overseas business that made us all redundant.
achievements: Developed and trained YOLO-based AI models for weapon detection, leveraging Roboflow for large-scale data annotation and GPU acceleration for optimized performance.

Engineered real-time multi-person tracking across high-footfall environments, including Dubai Airport, capturing detailed attributes such as clothing, gender, and movements to support continuous operational monitoring.
Built ANPR-based vehicle tracking systems capable of identifying car makes and models, assisting law enforcement operations, including locating a missing person for the UK police.
Designed and deployed abandoned object detection and threat analysis features, enhancing counter-terrorism capabilities in critical infrastructure environments.

Contributed to architecture and deployment of an AI-driven CCTV platform using Java, React, Hibernate, JPA, Docker, and Kubernetes, ensuring scalable, high-performance operation in airports and law enforcement settings.
Recognized as part of an award-winning security initiative delivering cutting-edge AI surveillance solutions that strengthened national security operations.
responsibilities: Built YOLO models for weapon detection and person tracking
Managed data annotation pipelines with Roboflow
Deployed AI platform using Docker & Kubernetes
Maintained frontend micro applications that showed relevant information
